name: Beehiiv
description: Beehiiv is a newsletter platform built for growth. Use it to manage subscriptions, create and publish posts, segment your audience, manage custom fields and tags, run automations, track analytics, configure webhooks, and manage referral programs.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all subscriptions for a publication with filtering by status, tier, and email.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single subscription by ID.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_get_by_email
capabilities.description: Retrieve a subscription by email address.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subscription for a publication with optional UTM tracking, custom fields, and automation enrollment.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_update
capabilities.description: Update a subscription's status, tier, or custom fields.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a subscription by ID.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_bulk_create
capabilities.description: Create multiple subscriptions in a single bulk request.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_bulk_update
capabilities.description: Update multiple subscriptions in a single bulk request.

capabilities.name: posts_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all posts belonging to a publication with their performance metrics.

capabilities.name: posts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single post by ID with detailed stats.

capabilities.name: posts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new post for a publication with HTML content, subject, and scheduling options.

capabilities.name: posts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a post by ID.

capabilities.name: segments_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all audience segments for a publication.

capabilities.name: segments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific segment by ID with subscriber count.

capabilities.name: segments_expand
capabilities.description: Retrieve subscribers belonging to a segment and recalculate membership.

capabilities.name: custom_fields_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all custom fields for a publication.

capabilities.name: custom_fields_create
capabilities.description: Create a new custom field for subscriber profiles.

capabilities.name: custom_fields_update
capabilities.description: Update a custom field definition.

capabilities.name: custom_fields_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a custom field by ID.

capabilities.name: automations_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all automations for a publication.

capabilities.name: automations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific automation by ID.

capabilities.name: referral_program_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the referral program configuration for a publication.

capabilities.name: publications_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all publications associated with your API key.

capabilities.name: publications_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific publication by ID.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all webhooks for a publication.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook for real-time event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook by ID.

capabilities.name: subscription_tags_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all tags associated with subscriptions.

capabilities.name: subscription_tags_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subscription tag.

capabilities.name: tiers_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all subscription tiers for a publication.

capabilities.name: tiers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subscription tier.
